name: Dyaco International Inc.
summary: Dyaco International Inc. designs, manufactures, and distributes fitness, physical therapy, and sports equipment worldwide. It provides cardiovascular equipment for the home, commercial, and medical facilities; and indoor cycling solutions. The company offers its fitness, medical and rehabilitation, and physical therapy equipment to home users, commercial fitness operators, and physical therapy facilities under the Spirit Fitness, Xterra, Johnny G, SOLE Fitness, Philips, UFC, and gym80 brands. Dyaco International Inc. was founded in 1990 and is headquartered in Taipei City, Taiwan.
